items.title: CVE-2025-66288 | Parallels Toolbox CleanDrive link following (ZDI-25-1015)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Parallels Toolbox. It has been rated as critical. The impacted element is an unknown function of the component CleanDrive. The manipulation leads to link following. This vulnerability is uniquely identified as CVE-2025-66288. Local access is required to approach this attack. No exploit exists. Upgrading the affected component is advised.

items.title: CVE-2025-13392 | Synology DiskStation DS925+ SYNOPAMSSO::samlAuth improper authentication (ZDI-25-1040)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Synology DiskStation DS925+. It has been declared as critical. The affected element is the function SYNOPAMSSO::samlAuth. Executing manipulation can lead to improper authentication. This vulnerability is handled as CVE-2025-13392. The attack can only be done within the local network. There is not any exploit available. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-12686 | Synology BeeStation Plus auth_info stack-based overflow (ZDI-25-1039)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Synology BeeStation Plus. It has been classified as critical. Impacted is an unknown function. Performing manipulation of the argument auth_info results in stack-based buffer overflow. This vulnerability is known as CVE-2025-12686. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. No exploit is available. Upgrading the affected component is recommended.

items.title: CVE-2025-11727 | Omnichannel for WooCommerce Plugin up to 1.3.65 on WordPress sync cross site scripting (EUVD-2025-201140)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Omnichannel for WooCommerce Plugin up to 1.3.65 on WordPress and classified as problematic. This issue affects the function sync. Such manipulation leads to cross site scripting. This vulnerability is traded as CVE-2025-11727. The attack may be launched remotely. There is no exploit available.

items.title: CVE-2025-55076 | Plugin Alliance Installation Manager 1.4.0 InstallationHelper Service system privileges management
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability has been found in Plugin Alliance Installation Manager 1.4.0 and classified as critical. This vulnerability affects the function system of the component InstallationHelper Service. This manipulation causes improper privilege management. This vulnerability appears as CVE-2025-55076. The attack requires local access. There is no available exploit.

items.title: CVE-2025-13751 | OpenVPN up to 2.7_rc2 on Windows Interactive Service Agent allocation of resources
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as problematic, was found in OpenVPN up to 2.7_rc2 on Windows. This affects an unknown part of the component Interactive Service Agent. The manipulation results in allocation of resources. This vulnerability is reported as CVE-2025-13751. The attack requires a local approach. No exploit exists.

items.title: CVE-2024-32642 | MasaCMS up to 7.2.7/7.3.12/7.4.5 Password Reset origin validation
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, has been found in MasaCMS up to 7.2.7/7.3.12/7.4.5.
